home.hero_subtitle: Urubuga rwa mbere mu Rwanda rwifashisha AI mu gupima indwara z'inyanya. Rinda umusaruro wawe mu Kinyarwanda n'Icyongereza.
home.future_desc: Twashyize hamwe ikoranabuhanga rya AI n'ubumenyi bw'ubuhinzi mu Rwanda kugira ngo tuguhe umufasha mu mirimo yawe 24/7.
home.instant_scans_desc: Erekeza kamera ya terefone yawe ku babi. AI yacu imenya indwara mu masegonda n'icyizere cya 98%.
home.ai_chat_desc: Vugana n'umufasha w'ubwenge usobanukiwe ubutaka n'ikirere cy'u Rwanda. Iboneka 24/7 mu Kinyarwanda.
home.yield_opt_desc: Habwa inama n'imiti igufasha kurinda inyanya zawe no kuzongerera umusaruro mwinshi.
home.yield_increase_desc: Impuzandengo y'inyongera y'umusaruro ku bahinzi bakoresha AI mu gupima indwara.
home.zero_waste_desc: Gupima hakiri kare birinda ikwirakwizwa ry'indwara, bityo ukarinda umurima wawe wose.
home.join_desc: Fatanya n'abahinzi 500+ bo mu Rwanda uyu munsi. Tangira iminsi 15 y'ubufasha bwa AI ku buntu.

how_it_works.title: Uko TomatoDoc Ikora
how_it_works.subtitle: Uburyo bworoshye bw'intambwe 5 bwo kurinda inyanya zawe ukoresheje ikoranabuhanga rya AI.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Fungura konti yawe hanyuma wemeze imeri yawe ukoresheje imibare 6 (OTP) yohererejwe.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Tangira n'igerageza ry'ubuntu ry'iminsi 15 cyangwa uhitemo abonema y'umunsi, icyumweru, cyangwa ukwezi.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Fata ifoto y'ibabi ry'inyanya rirwaye cyangwa ukure ifoto muri terefone yawe.
how_it_works.step_4_title: Intambwe ya 4: Habwa Ibisubizo na AI
how_it_works.step_4_desc: AI yacu isuzuma ifoto ikaguha igisubizo ako kanya, ikwereka n'uburyo bwo kuvura iyo ndwara.
how_it_works.step_5_desc: Niba ukeneye ubufasha bwisumbuyeho, vugana n'abahanga mu buhinzi kuri WhatsApp, Imeri cyangwa Terefone.

dashboard.no_history: Nta kiganiro uragira. Tangira upimishe inyanya zawe!

detection.title: Gupima Indwara
detection.upload_desc: Ohereza ifoto y'ibabi ry'inyanya rirwaye kugira ngo AI ihuze n'indwara rishobora kuba rifite.

payment.title: Kwishura Abonema
payment.success_desc: Gihamya yawe yakiriwe kandi irimo gusuzumwa. Abonema yawe iraba yafunguwe mu masaha 24.

experts.title: Abahanga mu Buhinzi
experts.desc: Vugana n'abahanga bazobereye mu buhinzi bw'inyanya mu Rwanda.
experts.apply_desc: Fatanya natwe gufasha abahinzi bo mu Rwanda.
